Audit_Period: The specific time period when the quality audit was conducted.
Company_Name: Name of the company that underwent the quality audit.
Defect_Category: Category of the identified defects during the quality audit.
Defects_Per_100_Vehicles: The average number of defects identified per 100 vehicles during the quality audit.
Defect_Details: Detailed description of the defects identified during the quality audit including the aspects that required corrective actions.
